summary: A left-anchored hero proof block leads the slide, a right-side metric band widens the case, and compact proof sits beneath the hero.
composition_pattern: left hero, right support column, lower proof area
support_structure: optional narrow summary strip at the lower edge
when_to_use: One result or claim should clearly dominate the page
The slide needs a strong left-to-right argument flow
avoid_when: The slide needs two equally weighted bodies
